description: Style NoteWith its classic styling and colour, this floater from coolers will quickly become the pair that you wear the most. Team it with a patterned shirt and shorts for a day at the beach or with a T-shirt and jeans for an outing with friends. Product Details Brown and black floaters with fore-foot, mid-foot straps and elasticated ankle loops Brown stitch detail and perforations on strapsBranding on footbed and ankle strapBrown footbedTPU outsole with grooves Comes with a shoe bagMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
